task: Advanced high-value task: Hybrid Ferry Energy Leg Implementation Feasibility Note. Scenario: a platform owner wants to convert ambiguous measurements into deterministic review actions for hybrid ferry energy leg. Embedded packet: Records: R1 maneuver_kWh=76 charger_power_kW=112 charge_window_h=7; R2 maneuver_kWh=85 charger_power_kW=108 charge_window_h=10; R3 maneuver_kWh=71 charger_power_kW=123 charge_window_h=6. Remediation options: O1 changes maneuver_kWh by -12% cost=95000; O2 changes charger_power_kW by -18% cost=108200; O3 changes charge_window_h by -25% cost=65800; max_budget=134400. Rules and constraints: daily energy must fit usable battery plus charging with 20% reserve; missing values cannot be imputed and all calculations must use only the embedded packet. Required work: perform a sensitivity check around the governing threshold and identify records whose classification is unstable. Deliver hybrid_ferry_1.xlsx + expert_memo.md with formulas, intermediate values, row-level citations, explicit assumptions, sensitivity checks, and a final recommendation table. Do not invent inputs; mark ambiguous items as needs_review.
